methodology: Refactored to Empowered-style OKRs: a small set of company objectives, linked source objectives, source-level key results, explicit team ownership, and limited use of High Integrity Commitments.
description: Preparation Objectives for the next quarter.
okrDesignPrinciples: Objectives describe meaningful business and customer outcomes, not feature delivery.
Key results measure source objectives, while source objectives map upward into a small set of company objectives.
Every key result names executing and supporting teams so accountability is explicit.
High Integrity Commitments are used sparingly and only for work that is materially deadline-sensitive.

companyObjectives.title: 2026-Q2 Make execution reliably repeatable
companyObjectives.statement: Improve the operating system behind the product so launches, service recovery, reliability, and cross-functional delivery become predictably repeatable.
companyObjectives.okrDesignNotes: Keeps teams accountable for operational outcomes and avoids turning roadmap delivery into a checklist of feature shipments.

inspiredByInsights.howItInspiresObjective: Provides evidence and product context for the objective's operations tradeoffs.

inspiredByInsights.insightTitle: Parking control tower convergence: validated discovery
inspiredByInsights.howItInspiresObjective: Provides evidence and product context for the objective's operations tradeoffs.

companyObjectives.title: 2026-Q2 Turn product progress into economic leverage
companyObjectives.statement: Translate better customer and operational outcomes into stronger revenue quality, retention, and strategic leverage for the business.
companyObjectives.okrDesignNotes: Separates commercial results from activity metrics so leaders can evaluate whether product work is compounding into business value.

inspiredByInsights.howItInspiresObjective: Provides evidence and product context for the objective's leverage tradeoffs.
Provides evidence and product context for the objective's leverage tradeoffs.

objectives.title: 2026-Q2 Prove that city intelligence drives real policy decisions
objectives.objective: Turn Arrive's city-planning proposition into a credible expansion path by linking operational mobility signals with intervention and outcome modeling.

linkedCustomers.customerGroup: City Authorities and Urban Mobility Planners

linkedCustomerKPIs.description: Time needed to move from intervention idea to outcome-backed decision.
Time drivers spend searching for parking before finding a valid place to stop.

linkedBusinessKPIs.description: Recurring revenue from city and authority accounts using planning, parking, and mobility solutions.

keyResults.target: Help cities move faster from question to evidence-backed action
keyResults.baseline: Policy decisions still rely on fragmented evidence and manual analysis
keyResults.statement: Reduce policy experiment decision cycle by providing reusable planning scenarios tied to operational data.

executingTeams.intent: Lead the work to reduce policy experiment decision cycle by providing reusable planning scenarios tied to operational data via City Mobility Intelligence.

supportingTeams.intent: Support the KR by contributing capability for policy experiment decision cycle, aligned with its focus on own scenario modeling, intervention analysis, and decision support for city policy workflows via Planning, Scenario & Outcome Modeling.

Support the KR by contributing capability for policy experiment decision cycle, aligned with its focus on own shared KPI semantics, data pipelines, executive reporting, and cross-portfolio analytics via Operational Data, KPI & Analytics Platform and Compliance, Privacy & Audit Controls.

keyResults.commitmentRationale: This KR should be pursued as an outcome target with room for discovery, iteration, and tradeoff.

keyResults.target: Use better parking and curb policy to reduce search traffic
keyResults.baseline: Cities still struggle to tie interventions to visible search-time outcomes
keyResults.statement: Reduce average parking search time by enabling faster pricing and curb-policy iteration based on shared city metrics.

executingTeams.intent: Lead the work to reduce average parking search time by enabling faster pricing and curb-policy iteration based on shared city metrics via Planning, Scenario & Outcome Modeling.

supportingTeams.intent: Support the KR by contributing capability for average parking search time, aligned with its focus on own the cross-domain mobility data model and city-facing insight experience via City Mobility Intelligence.

Support the KR by contributing capability for average parking search time, aligned with its focus on own in-car and automotive partner capabilities that extend parking and mobility services into connected-vehicle journeys via Automotive & In-Car Data Services.

keyResults.commitmentRationale: This KR should be pursued as an outcome target with room for discovery, iteration, and tradeoff.

keyResults.baseline: Expansion depends on making planning and operations feel like one coherent offer
keyResults.statement: Increase public-sector platform ARR by proving the value of city intelligence as an attach and expansion driver.

executingTeams.intent: Lead the work to improve public-sector platform ARR by proving the value of city intelligence as an attach and expansion driver via City Mobility Intelligence.

supportingTeams.intent: Support the KR by contributing capability for public-sector platform ARR, aligned with its focus on own scenario modeling, intervention analysis, and decision support for city policy workflows via Planning, Scenario & Outcome Modeling.

Support the KR by contributing capability for public-sector platform ARR, aligned with its focus on own shared KPI semantics, data pipelines, executive reporting, and cross-portfolio analytics via Operational Data, KPI & Analytics Platform and Compliance, Privacy & Audit Controls.

keyResults.commitmentRationale: This KR should be pursued as an outcome target with room for discovery, iteration, and tradeoff.

linkedInitiatives.description: City intelligence operating model initiative focused on improving city mobility intelligence, planning, scenario & outcome modeling, operational data, KPI & analytics platform, and enterprise integration layer across City Mobility Insight Board and Mobility Intelligence Data API.

inspiredByInsights.howItInspiresObjective: Provides evidence and product context for the objective's operations tradeoffs.
Provides evidence and product context for the objective's operations tradeoffs.

objectives.title: 2026-Q2 Turn business mobility into a cleaner admin and billing product
objectives.objective: Prepare the next quarter around stronger fleet and workplace parking control so business accounts see lower admin burden and better spend governance.

linkedCustomerKPIs.description: Number of employee reimbursement artifacts requiring manual handling.
Share of parking usage that falls outside defined business policy.

linkedBusinessKPIs.description: Recurring revenue from fleets, employers, and business mobility accounts.

keyResults.target: Remove manual reimbursement work from everyday parking use
keyResults.baseline: Admin teams still handle too many ad hoc parking artifacts
keyResults.statement: Reduce receipts per employee by moving more usage into centralized policy, billing, and tagging flows.

executingTeams.intent: Lead the work to reduce receipts per employee by moving more usage into centralized policy, billing, and tagging flows via Fleet & Business Policy Controls and Business Billing, Tagging & Expense Controls.

supportingTeams.intent: Support the KR by contributing capability for receipts per employee, aligned with its focus on own the shared ledger, settlement, and reconciliation backbone across parking, transit, business, and partners via Settlement, Ledger & Revenue Reconciliation.

Support the KR by contributing capability for receipts per employee, aligned with its focus on own in-car and automotive partner capabilities that extend parking and mobility services into connected-vehicle journeys via Automotive & In-Car Data Services.

keyResults.commitmentRationale: This KR should be pursued as an outcome target with room for discovery, iteration, and tradeoff.

keyResults.target: Tighten business parking governance without adding friction
keyResults.baseline: Policy drift is still common across locations and temporary access cases
keyResults.statement: Reduce policy exception rate by introducing clearer entitlements, visitor workflows, and account controls.

executingTeams.intent: Lead the work to reduce policy exception rate by introducing clearer entitlements, visitor workflows, and account controls via Fleet & Business Policy Controls and Business Billing, Tagging & Expense Controls.

supportingTeams.intent: Support the KR by contributing capability for policy exception rate, aligned with its focus on own the shared ledger, settlement, and reconciliation backbone across parking, transit, business, and partners via Settlement, Ledger & Revenue Reconciliation.

Support the KR by contributing capability for policy exception rate, aligned with its focus on own permits, access-control, LPR, and parking-compliance workflows across channels and sites via Access, Permit & LPR Control and Enforcement & Compliance Workflows.

keyResults.commitmentRationale: This KR should be pursued as an outcome target with room for discovery, iteration, and tradeoff.

keyResults.target: Make business mobility a more expandable product line
keyResults.baseline: Expansion depends on cleaner admin economics and better cost control
keyResults.statement: Increase business and fleet ARR by proving that Arrive reduces admin overhead and improves spend visibility.

executingTeams.intent: Lead the work to improve business and fleet ARR by proving that Arrive reduces admin overhead and improves spend visibility via Fleet & Business Policy Controls and Business Billing, Tagging & Expense Controls.

supportingTeams.intent: Support the KR by contributing capability for business and fleet ARR, aligned with its focus on own the shared ledger, settlement, and reconciliation backbone across parking, transit, business, and partners via Settlement, Ledger & Revenue Reconciliation.

Support the KR by contributing capability for business and fleet ARR, aligned with its focus on own in-car and automotive partner capabilities that extend parking and mobility services into connected-vehicle journeys via Automotive & In-Car Data Services.

keyResults.commitmentRationale: This KR should be pursued as an outcome target with room for discovery, iteration, and tradeoff.
